title: Game of Darts

hero.alt: Game of Darts scoring app hero artwork for darts match setup and score tracking

shortDescription: Track scores, analyse performance, and enjoy every match with confidence.
description: Game Of Darts is a feature-rich darts scoring app from [BarkinMad Studios](/about), designed for players of every ability. Whether you're playing a casual game with friends, practising at home, or competing in league matches, the app makes scoring fast, accurate, and enjoyable while helping you track your progress over time.
features: Designed for casual and competitive play

faq.question: What is Game Of Darts?
faq.answer: Game Of Darts is a feature-rich darts scoring app for iPhone and iPad developed by [BarkinMad Studios](/about). It combines fast score entry with detailed statistics, multiple game modes, and player tracking.

faq.question: Who is Game Of Darts designed for?
faq.answer: Whether you're playing casually with friends, practising on your own, or competing in organised matches, Game Of Darts helps you score quickly, track your progress, and enjoy every game.

faq.question: Is Game Of Darts available on the App Store?
faq.answer: Yes. You can download Game Of Darts from the App Store using the link on this page.

seoTitle: Game Of Darts | Darts Scoring App | BarkinMad Studios
summary: Game Of Darts is a feature-rich darts scoring app for iPhone and iPad with multiple game modes, DartBot, player statistics, achievements, leaderboards, and fast score entry.
